items.d: somebody who cannot stop doing a thing that is very bad for them
items.s: He plays on his screen all night and cannot stop. Everybody calls him a screen ___.
items.hintDe: Jemand, der von etwas nicht mehr loskommt.

items.d: when somebody cannot stop doing a thing that is very bad for them
items.s: She cannot stop looking at her screen; she has a bad ___.
items.hintDe: Du kannst mit etwas einfach nicht mehr aufhören.

items.d: a place where books, cars and pictures go to the people who pay the most money
items.s: At an ___ you can pay a lot of money for a very old painting.
items.hintDe: Wer am meisten bietet, bekommt hier das Stück.

items.d: an illegal place where you pay money for what you cannot find in any shop
items.s: You cannot find these in any shop. People have to use the ___.
items.hintDe: Hier kaufst du heimlich Dinge, die es nirgends offiziell gibt.

items.d: to be destroyed completely in a fire
items.s: The old house was on fire all night and ___.
items.hintDe: Das Feuer lässt vom Gebäude nichts mehr übrig.

items.d: to look for and keep many books, cars or pictures because you love them
items.s: I love to ___ pretty stones and rocks from the beach.
items.hintDe: Du suchst viele schöne Dinge und behältst sie als Hobby.

items.d: all the books, cars or pictures that somebody keeps because they love them
items.s: She has an amazing ___ of old cars at home.
items.hintDe: All die Dinge, die jemand über die Jahre zusammengetragen hat.

items.d: an order from somebody that everybody must do at once
items.s: When the officer calls out a ___, all the men must do it at once.
items.hintDe: Ein klarer Befehl, dem alle sofort folgen müssen.

items.d: to make somebody think and think but still not understand a thing
items.s: I do not understand the new lesson at all; it really ___ me.
items.hintDe: Du machst, dass jemand nichts mehr versteht.

items.d: one of the many books that all look just like it
items.s: The library has three ___ of that famous book.
items.hintDe: Ein einzelnes Buch von vielen, die alle gleich aussehen.

items.d: to put somebody to death in prison for a very bad crime
items.s: After the murder, the man was ___ in prison.
items.hintDe: Als Strafe wird ein Mensch getötet.

items.d: when you love a thing so much that you want to know all about it
items.s: His ___ with sand is so strong that he reads about it all day.
items.hintDe: Etwas zieht dich so stark an, dass du alles darüber wissen willst.

items.d: very, very angry
items.s: I am ___ that nobody asked me first.
items.hintDe: Du bist so wütend, dass du fast platzt.

items.d: to start to feel very angry, or to lose control of how you feel
items.s: If I have to wait in this queue much longer, I am going to ___!
items.hintDe: Du verlierst fast die Nerven und drehst durch.

items.d: a man or woman in court who can put a thief in prison
items.s: The ___ gives the murderer ten years in prison.
items.hintDe: Diese Person entscheidet, wer ins Gefängnis muss.

items.d: too bright and a little funny to look at, and not nice at all
items.s: The restaurant is decorated with ___, colourful pictures that I do not really like.
items.hintDe: Etwas ist zu bunt und billig - einfach kitschig.

items.d: a man or woman who looks after all the books in a library
items.s: Ask the ___ if you cannot find the book you want in the library.
items.hintDe: Diese Person arbeitet in der Bibliothek und hilft beim Suchen.

items.d: a place where many books are free for everybody to read or borrow
items.s: I never have to pay for books here. I borrow them all from the ___.
items.hintDe: Hier kannst du Bücher ausleihen, ohne zu bezahlen.

items.d: to not be there for a thing, so you cannot enjoy it
items.s: Everybody is talking about the new show, and I do not want to ___ on it.
items.hintDe: Du bist nicht dabei und verpasst etwas Schönes.

items.d: a big old building where monks live and pray
items.s: The monks lived in a big old ___ in the mountains.
items.hintDe: Das große Gebäude, in dem Mönche zusammenleben.

items.d: a man who lives in a monastery and prays every day
items.s: A ___ is a man who lives and prays in a monastery.
items.hintDe: Ein Mann, der im Kloster lebt und betet.

items.d: with very little red in your skin, often because you feel ill
items.s: She was ill in bed for a week, so now she looks very ___.
items.hintDe: Dein Gesicht hat kaum Farbe, oft wenn du krank bist.

items.d: very expensive or very dear to somebody
items.s: This old photograph of my grandmother is very ___ to me.
items.hintDe: Etwas, das dir sehr viel wert ist.

items.d: to keep an old building or thing in good order so it does not go away
items.s: We must ___ these old buildings so that our children can enjoy them too.
items.hintDe: Du hältst etwas Altes in gutem Zustand, damit es bleibt.

items.d: not found very often
items.s: You will not find many of these. They are very ___.
items.hintDe: Davon gibt es nur ganz wenige - man sieht es kaum.

items.d: to take money or jewels from a house or shop that is not yours
items.s: Thieves came into the house at night to ___ the family of all their money.
items.hintDe: Diebe nehmen jemandem mit Gewalt alles weg.

items.d: to tell somebody in court that they must die for a very bad crime
items.s: The judge ___ the murderer, and he was executed a week afterwards.
items.hintDe: Der Richter spricht aus, dass der Mensch sterben muss.

items.d: a thin, white piece that you write on
items.s: Take out a clean ___ and write your homework on it.
items.hintDe: Ein dünnes, weißes Blatt zum Schreiben.

items.d: to make a book, a show or a thing shorter in time
items.s: That book was much too long, so they had to ___ it.
items.hintDe: Du machst etwas kürzer, weil es zu lang ist.

items.d: to come or arrive, often when nobody waits for you
items.s: We waited a long time, but our guests did not ___.
items.hintDe: Jemand taucht plötzlich auf, oft ohne Ankündigung.

items.d: to talk to somebody very, very close to their ear so it is a secret
items.s: He ___ in my ear to tell me the secret.
items.hintDe: Du sprichst ganz leise ins Ohr.
